# Vendored dependencies

## Astronomy Engine 2.1.19

- File: `astronomy-engine-2.1.19.min.js`
- Package: `astronomy-engine`
- Author: Donald Cross
- Source: https://github.com/cosinekitty/astronomy
- License: MIT

The browser bundle is kept locally so the natal-chart features do not depend on
a third-party CDN at runtime. It is loaded on demand by `ensureAstronomyLoaded()`
in `index.html`.
